0.text: Diffuse, minimal increase in density within the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: Minimal increase in density within the lingular segment of the upper lobe

2.text: Nodules with surrounding ground glass opacities in the peripheral regions of the right lung

3.text: Linear density increases in the peripheral regions of the right lung

4.text: Scattered areas of ground glass opacification in the right lung

6.text: Largest nodule in the peripheral region of the right middle lobe measuring approximately 6x7 mm

7.text: Minimal increase in the size of the largest nodule

8.text: Other subcentimeter nodules scattered throughout both lungs
